name: Zucchini Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the bisquick, parmesan, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the eggs to the mixture.
3. Mix in the grated zucchini.
4. Grease a hot pan or griddle with butter.
5. Pour batter into the pan.
6. Fry for 3 minutes on each side.
7. Serve warm. This recipe makes 8 to 10 fritters.
